title: Mace Rituals
description: Mace Rituals is a Paper 1.21.11 plugin with a custom ritual mace system, anti-dupe protection, holder tracking, storage blocking, config toggles, and full ritual effects.
body:
Mace Ritual is a custom **Paper** **1.21.11** plugin built around a one-at-a-time ritual mace system with hard anti-dupe and anti-storage protection.

**Features include:**

- Custom ritual-based mace crafting
- Craft limit tracking
- Crafter and last-holder tracking
- Auto cleanup for invalid or glitched mace IDs
- Admin mace removal support
- Ritual enable/disable toggle in config
- Automatic Flow Banner Pattern deletion while rituals are disabled
- Storage blocking for shelves, bundles, chest boats, storage minecarts, item frames, ender chests, shulkers, and standard Minecraft containers
- Ritual effects with boss bar, sounds, particles, breezes, and global titles
- Blocked enchant settings through config

Built for stronger control, cleaner tracking, and stopping abuse or glitches before they become a problem.

For me information regarding the mace check out the [wiki](https://modrinth.com/mod/mace-combat-backport).

**Commands:**

 /rituals on

/rituals off

/maceritual

/lockedmace:lmreload

/lockedmace:lockedmacereload

/lockedmace:maceritual

/lockedmace:removemaces

/lockedmace:rituals

**Socials:**

- [Discord](https://discord.gg/WAZe8ruSTm)
